articles.title: Wimbledon introduces video review on six courts for this year's tournament
articles.original_title: Wimbledon introduces video review on six courts for this year's tournament
articles.summary: Wimbledon will use video review technology for the first time at this year's tournament, the All England Club announced Saturday.  The oldest Grand Slam tennis tournament will have the technology available on Centre Court, No. 1 Court — the club's second-biggest stadium — plus four other show courts.  Video review made its Grand Slam tennis debut at the 2023 U.S. Open.
